hero.title: Get to know Tucumán on foot, with local guides.
hero.titleLine1: Get to know Tucumán on foot,
hero.subtitle: Join a free walking tour or pick a northern experience with local guides who love their land. Sort everything on WhatsApp — no cards, no hassle.
hero.galleryLabel: Gallery of experiences in the North

home.featuredSubtitle: A handful of picks to kick off your Tucumán trip on the right foot.
home.verticalsTitle: There's an outing for every traveler
home.verticalsSubtitle: We started with free walking tours in Tucumán and added adventure, experiences and northern food.
home.topRatedSubtitle: The picks travelers recommend the most.
home.emptyBody: The catalog is growing. Come back soon or message us on WhatsApp and we'll put together something just for you.
home.errorTitle: Oops, we couldn't load the experiences
home.errorBody: Try again in a little while, or let us know if the issue persists.
home.categoriesTitle: Four ways to see the north
home.categoriesSubtitle: Pick the way you want to experience Tucumán and we'll show you what's on.
home.howStep1Body: Browse local guides by type of plan and keep the one you like best. Each profile tells you who they are.
home.howStep2Body: Fill in a short form and we'll open the guide's chat with your request ready to send.
home.howStep3Body: The guide arranges time and place with you. You pay them directly. Then tell us how it went.
home.whyTitle: Relax — you're covered, start to finish
home.whySubtitle: We're not a giant agency: we're a network of licensed local guides from northern Argentina.
home.why1Body: Every guide is verified and registered with the province. You always know who you're going out with.
home.why2Body: You sort everything via WhatsApp with the guide. No checkout, no card, no middlemen.
home.why3Body: Talk directly to the guide if you need to reschedule. No automatic penalties.
home.why4Body: Curated by people who live in Tucumán, Salta and Jujuy. Not by a distant algorithm.
home.ctaBandBody: Pick your walk, message the guide and live Tucumán like a local. It's free to start.

detail.noSchedule: We'll coordinate the time via WhatsApp.
detail.bookSoonNote: Booking from here is coming soon. For now you coordinate directly with the guide.
detail.notFoundBody: It may have been taken down, or the link is broken. Have a look at the other active experiences.

fwt.title: Free walking tours in Tucumán
fwt.subtitle: Walks guided by locals through the historic center. Tip what you feel the tour was worth.

adventure.title: Adventure in northern Argentina
adventure.subtitle: Treks, kayaking and active outings in Tucumán and around. For travelers who pack hiking shoes.

experience.title: Experiences in Tucumán
experience.subtitle: Urban, cultural and nature tours with licensed local guides.

gastronomy.title: Tucumán cuisine
gastronomy.subtitle: Empanadas, locro, valley wines. Northern flavors with the people who cook them.

results.emptyBody: Try clearing the filters or browse other categories.

booking.title: Book via WhatsApp
booking.intro: Fill in your details and we'll send you to WhatsApp with the guide. You confirm the booking there.
booking.name: Your name
booking.messagePlaceholder: Anything the guide should know: preferred language, accessibility, etc.
booking.askOnly: Just want to ask something? Message us directly on WhatsApp
booking.noAvailableDates: No published dates in the next 60 days. We'll coordinate via WhatsApp.
booking.successBody: If the app didn't open, click here:
booking.errorBody: Try again or message us directly on WhatsApp.
